notes.purpose: Analyze SharingRule objects for privilege escalation modeling
key_fields: SharedToType - Who receives access (Group, Role, RoleAndSubordinates, etc.)
SharedTo - ID of the Group/Role receiving access
RowCause - Sharing reason (Sharing Rule, Manual, Owner, etc.)
security_implications: Sharing rules can grant access that bypasses OWD restrictions
SharedTo groups/roles gain access to records owned by the criteria
Critical for analyzing lateral movement and privilege escalation
